nodes.label: chess-agent.md
nodes.description: Chess knowledge base reference: piece values, openings, tactics, mates, endgames, SM-2, Stockfish UCI, Chess.com API, ELO ratings, terminology

nodes.label: SM-2 nextInterval formula
nodes.description: Pseudocode for computing next review interval from quality q, easiness factor EF, and repetition count n

nodes.label: Stockfish UCI Commands
nodes.description: uci, isready, position fen, go depth, go movetime, stop, quit

nodes.label: Piece Values (Centipawns)
nodes.description: Pawn 100, Knight 320, Bishop 330, Rook 500, Queen 900, King infinite

nodes.label: ELO Rating System
nodes.description: Rating bands from Beginner (<800) to International Master/Grandmaster (2500+) with associated skill suggestions

nodes.label: Opening Theory
nodes.description: e4 (open games), d4 (closed games), and flank openings with named variations (Italian Game, Ruy López, Sicilian, French, Caro-Kann, Queen's Gambit, KID, Nimzo-Indian, Grünfeld, English, Réti, etc.)

nodes.label: Tactical Patterns
nodes.description: Fork, Pin, Skewer, Discovered Attack, Double Check, Zwischenzug, Deflection, Decoy, Overloading, X-Ray

nodes.label: Checkmate Patterns
nodes.description: Back Rank, Smothered, Scholar's, Fool's, Epaulette, Anastasia's, Arabian, Opera, Boden's, Hook, Dovetail mates

nodes.label: Endgame Technique
nodes.description: King activation, passed pawns, rooks behind passed pawns, opposition, zugzwang, and essential endgame table (K+Q vs K, K+R vs K, Lucena, Philidor, etc.)

nodes.label: Common Chess Terms
nodes.description: Blunder, Mistake, Inaccuracy, Tempo, Initiative, Compensation, Fianchetto, En passant, Promotion, Castling — used for UI labels/tooltips
